cleavage agent: digested either with trypsin (Sequencing Grade Modified Trypsin, Part No. V511A; Promega, Madison, WI)
fragmentation method: data-dependent high energy collision-induced dissociation (HCD) MS/MS scans
ionization type: spray voltage of +2000 V was used with a heated ion transfer setting of 275°C for desolvation
labeling: the goal of this study was to assess the role of TRAP5 in immune cell recruitment during lung infection.
